welcome.title: Welcome to moru
welcome.intro: moru is a desktop studio for translating Minecraft modpacks with AI. Load a modpack folder and moru finds the translatable text, translates it, and exports a resource pack you can drop straight into the game.
welcome.scanDesc: Automatically finds translatable text in mod JARs, configs, and quests
welcome.translateDesc: Produces consistent translations using the glossary and translation memory
welcome.exportDesc: Saves a resource pack and patches ready to drop into the game

key.title: Connect an AI provider
key.desc: Register an API key for the provider you want to translate with. Keys are encrypted in this computer's OS keychain and never sent to our servers.
key.loadError: Could not load the provider list
key.hint: You can add or change keys anytime in Settings → Models · API keys

account.title: Discord sign-in (optional)
account.desc: Connect a moru.gg account to share finished translation packs with the community and earn contribution points.
account.waitingBrowser: Finish signing in from your browser…
account.shareBenefitDesc: Publish finished packs to the community for other players
account.scoreBenefitDesc: Earn points for sharing and reviewing translations
account.optional: Every translation feature works without signing in

tour.title: You're all set
tour.desc: You can start your first translation now. Here's how the screens flow.
tour.homeDesc: Pick a modpack folder or auto-detect one from installed launchers
tour.wizardDesc: Select → Scan → Settings → Progress → Review → Export
tour.libraryDesc: Refine terms and reopen past jobs anytime
